mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_practice_plan (user_id, title, status, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, status, start_date, end_date FROM t_practice_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_date DESC, id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_practice_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_practice_plan SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_plan_items (plan_id, score_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{planId}, #{scoreId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_plan_items WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND score_id = #{scoreId}
mapper.select: SELECT pi.id, pi.plan_id, pi.score_id, pi.sort_order, s.title, s.artist, s.image_url FROM t_plan_items pi INNER JOIN t_score s ON pi.score_id = s.id WHERE pi.plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY pi.sort_order ASC, pi.id ASC
